== Slug Dragon Tutor ♂ ==
This dragon tutor focuses on grooming outstanding young dragons. With vast teaching experience, he is trusted by most parents!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain the Slug Dragon Tutor, you must first reach T6 Dragon form, then use a dragon orb to wish for said partner, asking the dragon for someone to train your Slug Dragon minions

===☆☆☆ > ★★★===
After a short message chain (4 responses) the Slug Dragon Tutor will ask for a fee of 3,000 White Tadpoles, after paying you will then instantly befriend the partner and be gifted 60 Dragon Manuals

==Rent==
Slug Dragon Tutor rent is collected on '''Thursday''' and found upon a pile of books to the left of him

[IMAGE frameless, left]
 '''Normal Rent''':

 '''Rare Rent''':

 '''1-time Rent''':

 '''Lv. 10 Rent''':
<br>

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Gene Speedups!
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward 
|-
|★
| Gene Speedup 1 Hour
|-
|★★
| Gene Speedup 1 Hour
|-
|★★★
| Gene Speedup 1 Hour
|-
|★★★★
| Gene Speedup 2 Hour
|-
|★★★★★
| Gene Speedup 3 Hour
|-
| ★★★★★★
| Gene Speedup 4 Hour
|}<br>

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
! style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |[[File:Sonnet.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Sonnet]]<br>[[Sonnet]] 
! style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |[[File:Euclid's Elements.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Euclid's Elements]]<br>[[Euclid's Elements]] 
! style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |[[File:Leaf Manuscript.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Leaf Manuscript]]<br>[[Leaf Manuscript]] 
! style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |[[File:Theory of Population.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Theory of Population]]<br>[[Theory of Population]]
|-
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" | [[File:The School of Athens.png|frameless|50x50px|link=The School of Athens]]<br>[[The School of Athens]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |[[File:Encyclopedia.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Encyclopedia]]<br>[[Encyclopedia]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |[[File:The Prince.png|frameless|50x50px|link=The Prince]]<br>[[The Prince]] 
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |[[File:Science Magazine Vol.1.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Science Magazine Vol.1]]<br>[[Science Magazine Vol.1]]
|}

==Tutor's Homework==
With great experience, Slug Dragon Tutor provides the most comprehensive teaching!
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''Research Skill Required'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!!'''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| || ||ART +5||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +0.5 Minutes
|-
|2||180||2,000||ART +10||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +1 Minutes
|-
|3||190 ||4,500||ART +15||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +1.5 Minutes
|-
|4|| 200||8,000||ART +20||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +2 Minutes
|-
|5||210 || 12,500||ART +25||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +2.5 Minutes
|-
|6||220||18,000||ART +30||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +3 Minutes
|-
|7||230||24,500||ART +35||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +3.5 Minutes
|-
|8||240|| 32,000||ART +40||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +4 Minutes
|-
|9||250||40,500 ||ART +45||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +4.5 Minutes
|-
|10||260||50,000||ART +50||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +5 Minutes
|-
|11||270||60,500 ||ART +55||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +5.5 Minutes
|-
| 12||285||72,000||ART +60||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +6 Minutes
|-
|13||300||84,500||ART +65||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +6.5 Minutes
|-
|14|| 315||98,000||ART +70||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +7 Minutes
|-
|15||330 ||112,000||ART +75||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +7.5 Minutes
|-
|16||345||123,000||ART +80||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +8 Minutes
|-
|17||360||144,000||ART +85||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +8.5 Minutes
|-
|18||375 ||162,000||ART +90||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +9 Minutes
|-
|19||390||180,000||ART +95||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +9.5 Minutes
|-
|20||400 ||200,000||ART +100||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +10 Minutes
|-
|21||420||220,000||ART +105||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +10.5 Minutes
|-
|22|| 440||242,000||ART +110||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +11 Minutes
|-
|23||460||264,000||ART +115||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +11.5 Minutes
|-
|24||480|| 285,000||ART +120||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +12 Minutes
|-
|25||500 ||309,000||ART +125||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +12.5 Minutes
|-
|26||520||333,000||ART +130||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +13 Minutes
|-
|27||540||357,000||ART +135||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +13.5 Minutes
|-
|28 ||560|| 381,000||ART +140||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +14 Minutes
|-
|29||580||405,000||ART +145||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +14.5 Minutes
|-
|30 || 600||429,000||ART +150||Free Gene Speedup(Dragon) +15 Minutes
|}

== Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Tutor's Homework is. 
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!! '''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| ||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +10 
|-
|2||4000||Dragon Minion MAX +2||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|-
|3||6000||Dragon Minion MAX +3||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +30
|-
|4||8000||Dragon Minion MAX +4||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +40
|-
|5||10000||Dragon Minion MAX +5||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +50
|-
| 6||12000||Dragon Minion MAX +6||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +60
|-
|7||14000||Dragon Minion MAX +7|| Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +70
|-
|8||16000||Dragon Minion MAX +8||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +80 
|-
|9||18000||Dragon Minion MAX +9|| Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +90
|-
|10||20000||Dragon Minion MAX +10||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +100
|-
|11||22000||Dragon Minion MAX +11|| Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +110
|-
|12||24000||Dragon Minion MAX +12||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +120
|-
|13 || 26000||Dragon Minion MAX +13||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +130
|-
| 14||28000||Dragon Minion MAX +14|| Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +140
|-
|15||30000||Dragon Minion MAX +15||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +150
|-
|16 ||32000||Dragon Minion MAX +16||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|-
| 17||34000||Dragon Minion MAX +17||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +170
|-
|18||36000||Dragon Minion MAX +18||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +180
|-
|19||38000 ||Dragon Minion MAX +19||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +190
|-
|20||40000||Dragon Minion MAX +20||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +200
|-
|21||42000||Dragon Minion MAX +21||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +210
|-
|22||44000 ||Dragon Minion MAX +22||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +220
|-
|23|| 46000||Dragon Minion MAX +23||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +230
|-
|24||48000||Dragon Minion MAX +24||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +240
|-
|25||50000||Dragon Minion MAX +25||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +250
|-
|26||55000||Dragon Minion MAX +26||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +260
|-
| 27||60000||Dragon Minion MAX +27||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +270
|-
|28||65000||Dragon Minion MAX +28||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +280
|-
|29||70000||Dragon Minion MAX +29||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +290
|-
|30||75000||Dragon Minion MAX +30||Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop RUSH +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Slug Dragon Tutor specializes in '''[GENE] Genes''' specialization and therefore the research manual cost for the Dragon is halved. 

{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Lv.!!Manuals Required!!Lv.!!Manuals Required
|-
|'''1-10'''||1||'''11-20'''||2
|-
|'''21-30'''||3||'''31-40'''||4
|-
|'''41-50'''||5||'''51-60'''||10
|-
|'''61-70'''||20||'''71-80'''||40
|-
|'''81-90'''||60||'''91-95'''||80
|-
|'''96'''||100 ||'''97'''||200
|-
|'''98'''||400|| '''99'''||600

|-
|'''100''' || 800
|}

==Minion - Slug Dragonling==
It was born from the dragon egg given by the Divine Dragon. It does not resemble the Divine Dragons, but it is indeed descended from them and has every power of a dragon!

===Special Ability - Wishmaking ===
Per 10 Slug Dragonlings in battle, Troop Wind Res +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Slug Dragonling!
{| class="wikitable"
!'''Name'''
!'''1-Star'''
!'''2-Star'''
!'''3-Star''' 
!'''4-Star''' 
!'''5-Star'''
!'''6-Star'''
|-
|Star of David
|Slug Dragonling HP +1%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +1%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +1%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|Quantum Cat
|Slug Dragonling HP +1%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +1%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +1%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|Yamato Mirror
|Slug Dragonling HP +2%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +2% 
|Slug Dragonling ATK +2%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +2%
|Slug Dragonling All Stats +3%
|
|-
|Blood of Dracula
|Slug Dragonling HP +2%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +2%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +2%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +2%
|Slug Dragonling All Stats +3%
|
|-
|Divine Comedy
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|Slug Dragonling DEF +4%
|-
|Athena Statue
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|Slug Dragonling HP +4%
|-
|Agamemnon Mask
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|Slug Dragonling ATK +4%
|-
|Mind Controller
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4%
|Slug Dragonling RUSH +4% 
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
